name: @wui-js/main
author: Sergio E. Belmar V. <wuijs.project@gmail.com>
description: WUI/JS - A vanilla JavaScript/CSS UI component library for building web interfaces.

scripts.prepack: rm README.md && cp NPM.md README.md && cp -r src/wui-js/main/. .
scripts.postpack: ln -s docs/README-en.md README.md && ls src/wui-js/main/ | grep -v '^LICENSE$' | xargs rm -rf
